newsSince: Positive but increasingly discovered. Early-June FQ1 was a record: revenue +16% y/y to ~$291M, non-GAAP EPS $0.51 (+34%), data-center revenue a record $71.6M on 800G with early 1.6T/LPO/LRO/CopperEdge traction. On June 17 Semtech launched 224 Gbps optical chips for AI/hyperscale data centers; analysts (UBS, others) raised PTs. Stock +4.4% since June 9.

sources.label: 224 Gbps AI optical chip launch (Sahm/Simply Wall St)
Record Q1: 800G optics, $71.6M data center (Yahoo Finance)

verdicts.rankRationale: On the latent AI-supply-chain lens, the 224 Gbps optical chip launch (June 17) plus record data-center revenue extend Semtech's high-speed signal-chain optionality well beyond the LoRa/IoT framing. New, company-specific evidence supports an up move, tempered by 119% YTD reducing latency.
verdicts.bull: 800G/1.6T optical and 224 Gbps chip ramp give real AI-network connectivity exposure.
verdicts.neutral: Turnaround intact but balance sheet still healing.
verdicts.bear: Speculative tag; product-cycle and execution risk after 119% YTD.

verdicts.rankRationale: Page calls SMTC 'less direct than HBM/packaging/networking,' but FQ1 (record $71.6M data center on 800G FiberEdge/Tri-Edge and CopperEdge ACCs) plus the June-17 224 Gbps launch show genuine, direct AI-network-bottleneck exposure that rank 51 still understates.
verdicts.bull: Direct 800G/1.6T optical and copper ACC content ramping into AI racks.
verdicts.neutral: Higher-direct than thesis implies, but mid-pack vs HBM/packaging leaders.
verdicts.bear: Cyclical analog/RF base; valuation full after big YTD.

verdicts.rankRationale: On the crowding-sensitive CPO lens, the 224 Gbps launch and record optics print confirm the thesis but it is now fully discovered: multiple PT raises to ~$200-225, rich forward multiple, prior insider selling. Fundamentals beat, residual asymmetry is thin, so hold near the top rather than push higher.
verdicts.bull: Best-in-class small-cap signal-integrity/optical leverage to AI networking.
verdicts.neutral: Thesis confirmed but largely priced; residual alpha shrinking.
verdicts.bear: 60x-type forward multiple, insider sales, crowding into the name.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Valuation derate as the discovery narrative matures
